parse_strategy_rule: Read only HTML/text from allowed complex-card URL.
Extract visible text and HTML tables.
Search labels: chain;residue;residue name;residue number;atom;covalent bond;ligand atom;protein atom;mechanism;warhead.
Keep raw evidence snippets short and metadata-only.
If chain/residue/bond cannot be unambiguously parsed, mark card as unresolved.
Never infer missing chain/residue/bond from pdb_id alone.
Ambiguous cards stay excluded from materialization.
